{{CargoClone
|name=Suzaku
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=152
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} ART +50
|gene3=Gene Simulation Power Checks -0.9%
|gene4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Angel Minion Cloning SPD +1.2%
|gene6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Angel Minion Cloning SPD +2%
|}}
